test_cmd: bun test --reporter=junit --reporter-outfile=/tmp/junit-out.xml src/scheduler/scheduler.test.ts src/tests/scheduled-tasks.test.ts; echo '--- JUNIT XML ---'; cat /tmp/junit-out.xml 2>/dev/null || true
FAIL_TO_PASS: calculateNextRun::calculates next run with cron expression
Scheduled Task CRUD Operations > Scheduled Tasks Integration::should create a scheduled task with cron expression
Scheduled Task CRUD Operations > Scheduled Tasks Integration::should create a scheduled task with interval
Scheduled Task CRUD Operations > Scheduled Tasks Integration::should list scheduled tasks with filters
runScheduleNow (Manual Trigger) > Scheduled Tasks Integration::should create a task when schedule is run manually
runScheduleNow (Manual Trigger) > Scheduled Tasks Integration::should update lastRunAt but NOT nextRunAt on manual run
